core_apis: NASA EONET, NASA FIRMS, NOAA Climate Data Online, AirNow AQI
implications_for_goat_truemark: GOAT structures wildfire, smoke, drought, and air-quality time series into preservable L-NFT/E-NFT assets; TrueMark can mint derived climate briefs and risk packages
spruked_com_integration: spruked.com hosts climate anomaly dashboards, alert views, and QR-linked snapshots
edge_case_handling: Provider outage or API key failure falls back to local mirror or cached snapshot; low-latency alerts carry timestamped confidence warning

core_apis: USDA NASS Quick Stats, USGS Water Services, NASA-USDA soil moisture references
implications_for_goat_truemark: GOAT normalizes crop, water, and soil indicators into reusable M-NFT/L-NFT templates; TrueMark can mint farm, yield, and resilience assets
spruked_com_integration: spruked.com hosts yield, moisture, and water-condition dashboards tied to regional views
edge_case_handling: Seasonal data gaps use prior-season or multi-year baselines with confidence reduction; key-gated USDA endpoints fall back to mirror

core_apis: CDC RESP-LENS, CDC PLACES, public health open datasets

spruked_com_integration: spruked.com hosts public-health dashboards and region-filtered trend summaries
edge_case_handling: Privacy-sensitive or suppressed fields remain excluded; unavailable public-health feeds fall back to local mirror with audit note
